{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Harmony
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
| name = Akura Harmony
| aliases = Harmony
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Truegold
| abilities = breathes darkness, soulfire, Eye of the Deep, access to Ghostwater, shadow madra, Shadow’s Edge technique
| affiliations = Akura clan
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Akura Harmony Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura]] Harmony is a member of the [[Akura clan]], a family known for utilizing [[shadow madra]] and bearing names based on virtues. A highly disciplined individual, Harmony dedicated himself to constant training and cycling to ensure he never wasted time. He was a competitive person whose rivalry with [[Lindon]] escalated into a feud, partly due to Harmony's behavior after being defeated in swordsmanship by [[Charity]]. He was known for his proficiency with the [[Shadow]]'s Edge, a difficult-to-defend striker technique that utilizes shadow and [[sword]] aspects to damage both the physical body and the spirit. During his time in [[Ghostwater]], he successfully retrieved the [[Eye of the Deep]] to return it to its origin. Harmony also utilized [[bloodline armor]] made of violet crystal, which featured a dark disc hovering behind his head. While he once possessed the ability to see as [[Monarchs]] do, he eventually met a violent end involving a collapsing world.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A peak [[Truegold]] of the [[Akura clan]] and [[Mercy]]'s former fiancé, [[Akura]] Harmony serves as a representative for his house. Clad in black-and-white [[sacred artist]]'s robes and violet crystal armor, he possesses a black disc [[Goldsign]], purple eyes, and a [[soulspace]] containing a spark of [[soulfire]]. This practitioner of [[shadow madra]] breathes darkness and has successfully raised a dead sapphire. Utilizing an [[Eye of the Deep]] to access [[Ghostwater]], Harmony stood before a stone birdbath and secured the [[Eye]] within a cage. His combat prowess was such that he left [[Lindon]]'s spirit and body completely exhausted after their fight.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]] is a [[Truegold]] at the peak of his stage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]] breathes darkness.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]]'s [[soulspace]] contains a spark of [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]] was [[Mercy]]'s fiancé.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]] has purple eyes and a black disc [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]] wears black-and-white [[sacred artist]]'s robes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Harmony]] is an [[Akura]] representative.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony raised a dead sapphire.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony has an [[Eye of the Deep]] and access to [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony is a member of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony shoved the [[Eye]] inside a cage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony possesses [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony stands in front of a stone birdbath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Harmony wears armor of violet crystal.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]'s spirit and body were exhausted from a fight with Harmony.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Sent to [[Ghostwater]] by the [[Akura]] family, [[Akura]] Harmony was a combatant who utilized an axe and once killed [[Renfei]] with a single strike. As the grand-nephew of [[Akura Charity]] and her former engagement partner, Harmony was selected by [[Charity]] to serve as the second member of her primary team. Following his death, Harmony's spirit became associated with a [[binding]] located inside [[Lindon's axe]]. Although [[Lindon]] felt reluctant to relinquish the weapon due to his connection to the [[Akura clan]], Harmony's presence remained tied to the tool.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Harmony]] is a character mentioned by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony was sent to [[Ghostwater]] by the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] wanted to tell her exactly what had happened to Harmony.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Harmony]] killed [[Renfei]] with a single attack.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony uses an axe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony is the grand-nephew of [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony was killed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony was an engagement partner of [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony was chosen by [[Charity]] to be the second on the primary team.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony's spirit is associated with a [[binding]] inside [[Lindon's axe]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is reluctant to give up [[Harmony's axe]] because of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Harmony was [[Charity]]'s selection for her team.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Harmony favors the [[Shadow’s Edge]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Harmony is a character [[Lindon]] thought of but did not name.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura clan]] took [[Lindon]] to task over Harmony.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] was treated similarly to Harmony.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Akura clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
